response.justification: Bogdan is a strong match for this role. He brings 15+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js as his current primary stack, directly aligned with the job's core requirements. His current role explicitly involves AI agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which is a rare and high-value match for the AI agent development requirement. He has hands-on experience with MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes, and demonstrates a deep testing culture through TDD advocacy and open-source testing tooling. The main gaps are the absence of explicit NestJS experience, limited React depth (Ember.js dominates his frontend history), and minimal Kotlin work — all of which are learnable given his demonstrated breadth and engineering maturity.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack engineering with TypeScript and Node.js as the current production stack, well exceeding the 6-year requirement
Active AI agent and MCP (Model Context Protocol) development at current role, directly matching the AI agent experience requirement
Proven testing culture: TDD practitioner, created open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and organized testing workshops
concerns: NestJS is not mentioned anywhere in the resume; fit with the primary backend framework is unconfirmed
React appears as a secondary tool; frontend work is dominated by Ember.js, raising questions about React depth at scale
Kotlin is absent from the resume; Java appears in limited, older contexts, leaving the secondary stack requirement largely unmet
